entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a key crop for livelihoods in arid and semi-arid regions

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Regions where peanut plays a key role to livelihood

entities.name: OLEIC ACID
entities.description: A major fatty acid in peanut that influences oil quality and health benefits

entities.name: LINOLEIC ACID
entities.description: A major fatty acid in peanut controlled by the ahFAD2 gene

entities.name: PALMITIC ACID
entities.description: A fatty acid that, along with oleic and linoleic acids, constitutes 90% of peanut fat composition

entities.name: OIL QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of peanut oil regulated by fatty acid composition

entities.name: SHELF-LIFE
entities.description: The duration peanut oil and food products remain usable, increased by high oleic acid content

entities.name: HEALTH BENEFITS
entities.description: Advantages for consumers resulting from high oleic acid content

entities.name: AHFAD2 GENE
entities.description: A gene that controls the quantity of oleic and linoleic acids in peanut

entities.name: AHFAD2 ALLELES
entities.description: Specific versions of the ahFAD2 gene used for marker-assisted selection

entities.name: SUNOLEIC 95R
entities.description: A peanut variety from which ahfad2 alleles were introgressed

entities.name: ICGV 05141
entities.description: A peanut variety used as the recipient for ahfad2 alleles

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to introgress ahfad2 alleles into ICGV 05141

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A method used to increase oleic acid and the oleic to linoleic acid ratio

entities.name: OLEIC TO LINOLEIC ACID RATIO
entities.description: The ratio between oleic and linoleic acids, increased through marker-assisted breeding

entities.name: RECOMBINANT LINES
entities.description: Peanut lines resulting from the introgression of ahfad2 alleles

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The amount of pods produced, which was superior in the recombinant lines

entities.name: POD/SEED ATTRIBUTES
entities.description: Desired characteristics of pods and seeds in the recombinant lines

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where farmers will benefit from high oleic peanut recombinant lines
